name: cf-b2b-website
description: B2B Product Exhibition Website on Cloudflare Workers

scripts.build:pages: node node_modules/wrangler/bin/wrangler.js deploy --dry-run --config wrangler.worker.toml --outdir=.pages-dist && node scripts/prepare-pages.mjs
scripts.deploy: npm run build:pages && cd .pages-dist && node ../node_modules/wrangler/bin/wrangler.js pages deploy . --project-name tht-autoinsertion-site --branch master

author: Southern Machinery Co., Ltd.
